2026-06-02JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of SaskatchewanAppointment of Michael W. Milani, K.C., of Regina, Saskatchewan, to be a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Saskatchewan, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on February 27, 2028.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Saskatchewan
precis: Appointment of Michael W. Milani, K.C., of Regina, Saskatchewan, to be a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Saskatchewan, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on February 27, 2028.
